channel.title: cspcert — recent CVEs
channel.description: Most recent CVEs assigned by cspcert (cspcert).

item.title: CVE-2018-17256
item.description: Persistent cross-site scripting (XSS) vulnerability in Umbraco CMS 7.12.3 allows authenticated users to inject arbitrary web script via the Header Name of a content (Blog, Content Page, etc.). The vulnerability is exploited when updating or removing…
